type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: This facility operated for only 11 months in 2020, while it operated for all 12 months in 2021. Fuel usage increased by around 80% from 4155.4 e3m3 in 2020 to 7574.9 e3m3 in 2021.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: This facility operated for only 11 months in 2020, while it operated for all 12 months in 2021. Fuel usage increased by nearly 70% from 4155.4 e3m3 in 2020 to 6994.1 e3m3 in 2021. The were also new fugitive surveys available in 2021, causing the significant changes in leak VOC emissions.
